# @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-evolution

> n8n community node for **Evolution** API

n8n community node for Evolution API (WhatsApp)

## Installation

```bash
npm install @n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-evolution
```

## Usage

1. In n8n: **Settings → Community Nodes → Install** → `@n8n-dev/n8n-nodes-evolution`
2. Add credentials: **Evolution API** → API Key
3. Use the node in your workflows

## Auto-generated

This node was auto-generated from an OpenAPI specification using
[@kelvinzer0/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate](https://github.com/kelvinzer0/n8n-openapi-node-ultimate).
